title: Add score() convenience method (mean accuracy) to all Naive Bayes fitted estimators
description:
sklearn ClassifierMixin provides score(X, y) → mean accuracy. Add to every Fitted*NB (and ideally as a default on a future ferrolearn-core HasScore trait).

Initial scope: just add score(&self, x, y) → Result<F, FerroError> to each FittedNB. Returns sum(predict(x) == y) / n. Add unit tests.
